market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Snap spins off AI video team into new company, Dotmo, due to costs
articles.description: The Snapchat maker is spinning off yet another internal unit. Dotmo will be comprised of current Snap staff who are leaving the social media company to focus on AI video development.

articles.title: Ireland mulls crypto safeguards in response to financial risks
articles.description: For the first time in seven years, the Irish government released an assessment related to digital assets, noting risks from money laundering, terrorism financing, sanctions violations and bribery.

articles.title: Wealthsimple launches Kalshi-powered prediction market app for Canadian investors
articles.description: The offering follows regulatory approval earlier this year and comes as prediction markets face legal challenges from regulators, exchanges and policymakers around the world.

articles.title: OpenAI is bringing on some big guns in the lead-up to its IPO
articles.description: OpenAI is bulking up before its IPO, landing Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball in the same week.

articles.title: The 11 standout startups from YC’s Demo Day, according to VCs
articles.description: TechCrunch spoke to investors to find the hottest startups in the Spring 2026 YC batch. Some of them commanded valuations of over $175 million, VCs said.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation leadership exodus continues with director’s departure
articles.description: Hsiao-Wei Wang’s departure adds to a wave of Ethereum Foundation exits, fueling debate over governance, decentralization and the network’s future.

articles.title: Bitcoin’s deeply discounted versus AI-stocks, but hawkish Fed risk lingers: Bitwise
articles.description: Bitwise analysts say Bitcoin trades in a historical value zone, but hawkish Federal Reserve signals and a competition for liquidity could sideline buyers.

articles.title: Rivian owners file lawsuit alleging false promises on self-driving features
articles.description: Plaintiffs in the class action complaint allege Rivian falsely promised for years it would bring hands-free driving to its first-generation R1 vehicles.

articles.title: Ex-Celsius CEO Mashinsky gets U.S. CFTC ban in final resolution with regulator
articles.description: Alexander Mashinsky, the founder of failed crypto lender Celsius, had earlier been imprisoned for fraud and is now formally banned from CFTC registration.

articles.title: Almost half of U.S. singles feel negatively about AI in dating, Match says
articles.description: About 47% of singles look negatively at the use of AI in dating -- but, many dating app users are open to AI helping with profile punch-ups and conversation starters.

articles.title: Amazon hopes to challenge Nvidia more directly by selling its AI chips
articles.description: AWS is in talks to sell its chips to other data centers. CEO Andy Jassy has said this represents a $50 billion opportunity for the company.

articles.title: HIVE secures $220M AI infrastructure contract with Bell and Cohere
articles.description: The deal is expected to add approximately $70 million in annual recurring revenue as the company scales its AI-focused operations.

articles.title: AI data centers just got a government-mandated fast lane to the grid
articles.description: FERC told grid operators to give data centers a fast lane for interconnections, but it failed to address electricity supply shortages.

articles.title: CME Group sues CFTC over crypto perpetual futures
articles.description: The lawsuit targets the federal regulator and Chair Michael Selig, alleging that the Commodity Futures Trading Commissioin is treating cryptocurrency “futures” as “swaps,” posing risks to derivatives markets.

articles.title: U.S. agencies seek stablecoin customer-ID rules akin to banks in new GENIUS Act pitch
articles.description: The Federal Reserve, Treasury and other regulators have issued a proposed rule that would set identification standards, and it's now open for public comments.

articles.title: Bitcoin miners need billions to fund AI ambitions, led by IREN’s $21B gap
articles.description: IREN leads public Bitcoin miners with a projected $21.1 billion AI infrastructure funding gap, underscoring the capital-intensive nature of converting mining sites into data centers.

articles.title: ‘Queer Eye’s’ life coach Karamo Brown launches Kē, a wellness app featuring his AI digital clone
articles.description: Karamo Brown, famous for his pep talks on Netflix’s “Queer Eye,” has jumped into the wellness and AI space with his new app, Kē. articles.title: 哄睡小孩新幫手，亞馬遜推 Echo Kids 新功能 Sleep Studio 助力睡前儀式更有效
articles.description: 亞馬遜 11 日推出 Echo Kids 新功能 Sleep Studio，將 Echo 與 Echo Kid […]

articles.title: 直擊銀河系心臟，天文學家尋獲距離超大質量黑洞最近的疑似超新星殘骸
articles.description: 近日，天文學家利用 NASA 錢卓拉 X 射線天文台（Chandra X-ray Observatory）的觀 […]

articles.title: Apple opens up App Store to new competition in Brazil
articles.description: Apple’s grip on iPhone app distribution is loosening in another major market: Brazil.
